name: Antoni Gaudí
title: Architect
bio: Spanish architect and the best-known practitioner of Catalan Modernism. His masterwork, the Sagrada Família basilica in Barcelona, remains under construction more than a century after his death.
faith: A devout Catholic whose later years were entirely dedicated to building the Sagrada Família as an offering to God. He lived ascetically and attended Mass daily. He is currently a candidate for canonization in the Catholic Church.

sources.title: Antoni Gaudí — Wikipedia
sources.note: Biography including his devout faith and canonization cause

sources.title: Sagrada Família — Wikipedia
sources.note: His life's masterwork dedicated to the Holy Family

tagline: Designed the Sagrada Família as a Bible in stone
